data.name: Acrobatic
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Jump checks and Tumble checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Jump checks and Tumble checks.

data.name: Agile
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Balance checks and Escape Artist checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Balance checks and Escape Artist checks.

data.name: Alertness
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Listen checks and Spot checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Listen checks and Spot checks.

data.name: Animal Affinity
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Handle Animal checks and Ride checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Handle Animal checks and Ride checks.

data.name: Armor Proficiency (Heavy)
data.description: When you wear a type of armor with which you are proficient the armor check penalty for that armor applies only to Balance Climb Escape Artist Hide Jump Move Silently Pick Pocket and Tumble checks.
data.benefit: When you wear a type of armor with which you are proficient the armor check penalty for that armor applies only to Balance Climb Escape Artist Hide Jump Move Silently Pick Pocket and Tumble checks.

data.name: Armor Proficiency (Light)
data.description: When you wear a type of armor with which you are proficient the armor check penalty for that armor applies only to Balance Climb Escape Artist Hide Jump Move Silently Pick Pocket and Tumble checks.
data.benefit: When you wear a type of armor with which you are proficient the armor check penalty for that armor applies only to Balance Climb Escape Artist Hide Jump Move Silently Pick Pocket and Tumble checks.

data.name: Armor Proficiency (Medium)
data.description: When you wear a type of armor with which you are proficient the armor check penalty for that armor applies only to Balance Climb Escape Artist Hide Jump Move Silently Pick Pocket and Tumble checks.
data.benefit: When you wear a type of armor with which you are proficient the armor check penalty for that armor applies only to Balance Climb Escape Artist Hide Jump Move Silently Pick Pocket and Tumble checks.

data.name: Athletic
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Climb checks and Swim checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Climb checks and Swim checks.

data.name: Augment Summoning
data.description: Each creature you conjure with any summon spell gains a +4 enhancement bonus to Strength and Constitution for the duration of the spell that summoned it.
data.benefit: Each creature you conjure with any summon spell gains a +4 enhancement bonus to Strength and Constitution for the duration of the spell that summoned it.

data.name: Blind-Fight
data.description: In melee every time you miss because of concealment you can reroll your miss chance percentile roll one time to see if you actually hit.
data.benefit: In melee every time you miss because of concealment you can reroll your miss chance percentile roll one time to see if you actually hit.

data.name: Brew Potion
data.description: You can create a potion of any 3rd-level or lower spell that you know and that targets one or more creatures.
data.benefit: You can create a potion of any 3rd-level or lower spell that you know and that targets one or more creatures.

data.name: Cleave
data.description: If you deal a creature enough damage to make it drop you get an immediate extra melee attack against another creature within reach. You can use this ability once per round.
data.benefit: If you deal a creature enough damage to make it drop you get an immediate extra melee attack against another creature within reach. You can use this ability once per round.

data.name: Combat Casting
data.description: You get a +4 bonus on Concentration checks made to cast a spell or use a spell-like ability while on the defensive or while you are grappling or pinned.
data.benefit: You get a +4 bonus on Concentration checks made to cast a spell or use a spell-like ability while on the defensive or while you are grappling or pinned.

data.name: Combat Expertise
data.description: When you use the attack action or the full attack action in melee, you can take a penalty of as much as %1 on your attack roll and add the same number as a dodge bonus to your Armor Class.|CombatExpertiseMax
data.benefit: When you use the attack action or the full attack action in melee, you can take a penalty of as much as %1 on your attack roll and add the same number as a dodge bonus to your Armor Class.|CombatExpertiseMax

data.name: Combat Reflexes
data.description: You may make a number of additional attacks of opportunity equal to your Dexterity bonus.
data.benefit: You may make a number of additional attacks of opportunity equal to your Dexterity bonus.

data.name: Craft Magic Arms and Armor
data.description: You can create any magic weapon armor or shield whose prerequisites you meet.
data.benefit: You can create any magic weapon armor or shield whose prerequisites you meet.

data.name: Craft Rod
data.description: You can create any rod whose prerequisites you meet.
data.benefit: You can create any rod whose prerequisites you meet.

data.name: Craft Staff
data.description: You can create any staff whose prerequisites you meet.
data.benefit: You can create any staff whose prerequisites you meet.

data.name: Craft Wand
data.description: You can create a wand of any 4th-level or lower spell that you know.
data.benefit: You can create a wand of any 4th-level or lower spell that you know.

data.name: Craft Wondrous Item
data.description: You can create any wondrous item whose prerequisites you meet.
data.benefit: You can create any wondrous item whose prerequisites you meet.

data.name: Deceitful
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Disguise checks and Forgery checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Disguise checks and Forgery checks.

data.name: Deflect Arrows
data.description: Once per round when you would normally be hit with a ranged weapon you may deflect it so that you take no damage from it.
data.benefit: Once per round when you would normally be hit with a ranged weapon you may deflect it so that you take no damage from it.

data.name: Deft Hands
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Sleight of Hand checks and Use Rope checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Sleight of Hand checks and Use Rope checks.

data.name: Diehard
data.description: When reduced to between -1 and -9 hit points you automatically become stable.
data.benefit: When reduced to between -1 and -9 hit points you automatically become stable.

data.name: Diligent
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Appraise checks and Decipher Script checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Appraise checks and Decipher Script checks.

data.name: Dodge
data.description: During your action, you designate an opponent and receive a +%1 dodge bonus to Armor Class against attacks from that opponent.|FeatDodgeBonus
data.benefit: During your action, you designate an opponent and receive a +%1 dodge bonus to Armor Class against attacks from that opponent.|FeatDodgeBonus

data.name: Empower Spell
data.description: All variable numeric effects of an empowered spell are increased by one-half. Saving throws and opposed rolls are not affected nor are spells without random variables. An empowered spell uses up a spell slot two levels higher than the spell's actual level.
data.benefit: All variable numeric effects of an empowered spell are increased by one-half. Saving throws and opposed rolls are not affected nor are spells without random variables. An empowered spell uses up a spell slot two levels higher than the spell's actual level.

data.name: Endurance
data.description: You gain a +4 bonus on checks relating to stamina or extended physical activity. Also you may sleep in light or medium armor without becoming fatigued.
data.benefit: You gain a +4 bonus on checks relating to stamina or extended physical activity. Also you may sleep in light or medium armor without becoming fatigued.

data.name: Enlarge Spell
data.description: You can alter a spell with a range of close medium or long to increase its range by 100%%. An enlarged spell with a range of close now has a range of 50 ft. + 5 ft./level while medium-range spells have a range of 200 ft. + 20 ft./level and long-range spells have a range of 800 ft. + 80 ft./level. An enlarged spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spell's actual level. Spells whose ranges are not defined by distance as well as spells whose ranges are not close medium or long do not have increased ranges.
data.benefit: You can alter a spell with a range of close medium or long to increase its range by 100%%. An enlarged spell with a range of close now has a range of 50 ft. + 5 ft./level while medium-range spells have a range of 200 ft. + 20 ft./level and long-range spells have a range of 800 ft. + 80 ft./level. An enlarged spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spell's actual level. Spells whose ranges are not defined by distance as well as spells whose ranges are not close medium or long do not have increased ranges.

data.name: Eschew Materials
data.description: You can cast any spell that has a material component costing 1 gp or less without needing that component.
data.benefit: You can cast any spell that has a material component costing 1 gp or less without needing that component.

data.name: Exotic Weapon Proficiency
data.description: Choose a type of exotic weapon. You understand how to use that type of exotic weapon in combat.
data.benefit: Choose a type of exotic weapon. You understand how to use that type of exotic weapon in combat.

data.name: Extend Spell
data.description: An extended spell lasts twice as long as normal. A spell with a duration of concentration instantaneous or permanent is not affected by this feat. An extended spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spell's actual level.
data.benefit: An extended spell lasts twice as long as normal. A spell with a duration of concentration instantaneous or permanent is not affected by this feat. An extended spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spell's actual level.

data.name: Extra Turning
data.description: You can use your ability to turn or rebuke creatures four more times per day than normal.
data.benefit: You can use your ability to turn or rebuke creatures four more times per day than normal.

data.name: Far Shot
data.description: When you use a projectile weapon such as a bow its range increment increases by one-half (multiply by 1-1/2). When you use a thrown weapon its range increment is doubled.
data.benefit: When you use a projectile weapon such as a bow its range increment increases by one-half (multiply by 1-1/2). When you use a thrown weapon its range increment is doubled.

data.name: Forge Ring
data.description: You can create any ring whose prerequisites you meet.
data.benefit: You can create any ring whose prerequisites you meet.

data.name: Great Cleave
data.description: This feat works like Cleave except that there is no limit to the number of times you can use it per round.
data.prerequisite: Power Attack, Str 13, Base attack bonus +4
data.benefit: This feat works like Cleave except that there is no limit to the number of times you can use it per round.

data.name: Great Fortitude
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Fortitude saving throws.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Fortitude saving throws.

data.name: Greater Spell Focus
data.description: Add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against spells from the school of magic you select. This bonus stacks with the bonus from Spell Focus.
data.benefit: Add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against spells from the school of magic you select. This bonus stacks with the bonus from Spell Focus.

data.name: Greater Spell Penetration
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on caster level checks made to overcome a creature's spell resistance. This bonus stacks with the one from Spell Penetration.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on caster level checks made to overcome a creature's spell resistance. This bonus stacks with the one from Spell Penetration.

data.name: Greater Two-Weapon Fighting
data.description: You get a third attack with your off-hand weapon albeit at a -10 penalty.
data.prerequisite: Two-Weapon Fighting, Dex 19, Base attack bonus +11
data.benefit: You get a third attack with your off-hand weapon albeit at a -10 penalty.

data.name: Greater Weapon Focus
data.description: You gain a +1 bonus on all attack rolls you make using the selected weapon. This bonus stacks with other bonuses on attack rolls including the one from Weapon Focus.
data.benefit: You gain a +1 bonus on all attack rolls you make using the selected weapon. This bonus stacks with other bonuses on attack rolls including the one from Weapon Focus.

data.name: Greater Weapon Specialization
data.description: You gain a +2 bonus on all damage rolls you make using the selected weapon. This bonus stacks with other bonuses on damage rolls including the one from Weapon Specialization.
data.benefit: You gain a +2 bonus on all damage rolls you make using the selected weapon. This bonus stacks with other bonuses on damage rolls including the one from Weapon Specialization.

data.name: Heighten Spell
data.description: A heightened spell has a higher spell level than normal (up to a maximum of 9th level). Unlike other metamagic feats Heighten Spell actually increases the effective level of the spell that it modifies. All effects dependent on spell level (such as saving throw DCs and ability to penetrate a lesser globe of invulnerability) are calculated according to the heightened level. The heightened spell is as difficult to prepare and cast as a spell of its effective level.
data.benefit: A heightened spell has a higher spell level than normal (up to a maximum of 9th level). Unlike other metamagic feats Heighten Spell actually increases the effective level of the spell that it modifies. All effects dependent on spell level (such as saving throw DCs and ability to penetrate a lesser globe of invulnerability) are calculated according to the heightened level. The heightened spell is as difficult to prepare and cast as a spell of its effective level.

data.name: Improved Bull Rush
data.description: When you perform a bull rush you do not provoke an attack of opportunity from the defender. You also gain a +4 bonus on the opposed Strength check you make to push back the defender.
data.benefit: When you perform a bull rush you do not provoke an attack of opportunity from the defender. You also gain a +4 bonus on the opposed Strength check you make to push back the defender.

data.name: Improved Counterspell
data.description: When counterspelling you may use a spell of the same school that is one or more spell levels higher than the target spell.
data.benefit: When counterspelling you may use a spell of the same school that is one or more spell levels higher than the target spell.

data.name: Improved Critical
data.description: When using the weapon you selected your threat range is doubled.
data.benefit: When using the weapon you selected your threat range is doubled.

data.name: Improved Disarm
data.description: You do not provoke an attack of opportunity when you attempt to disarm an opponent nor does the opponent have a chance to disarm you. You also gain a +4 bonus on the opposed attack roll you make to disarm your opponent.
data.benefit: You do not provoke an attack of opportunity when you attempt to disarm an opponent nor does the opponent have a chance to disarm you. You also gain a +4 bonus on the opposed attack roll you make to disarm your opponent.

data.name: Improved Familiar
data.description: This feat allows spellcasters to acquire a new familiar from a nonstandard list but only when they could normally acquire a new familiar.
data.benefit: This feat allows spellcasters to acquire a new familiar from a nonstandard list but only when they could normally acquire a new familiar.

data.name: Improved Feint
data.description: You can make a Bluff check to feint in combat as a move action.
data.benefit: You can make a Bluff check to feint in combat as a move action.

data.name: Improved Grapple
data.description: You do not provoke an attack of opportunity when you make a touch attack to start a grapple. You also gain a +4 bonus on all grapple checks regardless of whether you started the grapple.
data.benefit: You do not provoke an attack of opportunity when you make a touch attack to start a grapple. You also gain a +4 bonus on all grapple checks regardless of whether you started the grapple.

data.name: Improved Initiative
data.description: You get a +4 bonus on initiative checks.
data.benefit: You get a +4 bonus on initiative checks.

data.name: Improved Overrun
data.description: When you attempt to overrun an opponent the target may not choose to avoid you. You also gain a +4 bonus on your Strength check to knock down your opponent.
data.benefit: When you attempt to overrun an opponent the target may not choose to avoid you. You also gain a +4 bonus on your Strength check to knock down your opponent.

data.name: Improved Precise Shot
data.description: Your ranged attacks ignore the AC bonus granted to targets by anything less than total cover and the miss chance granted to targets by anything less than total concealment.
data.prerequisite: Point Blank Shot, Dex 19, Base attack bonus +11
data.benefit: Your ranged attacks ignore the AC bonus granted to targets by anything less than total cover and the miss chance granted to targets by anything less than total concealment.

data.name: Improved Shield Bash
data.description: When you perform a shield bash you may still apply the shield's shield bonus to your AC.
data.benefit: When you perform a shield bash you may still apply the shield's shield bonus to your AC.

data.name: Improved Sunder
data.description: When you strike at an object held or carried by an opponent (such as a weapon or shield) you do not provoke an attack of opportunity. You also gain a +4 bonus on any attack roll made to attack an object held or carried by another character.
data.benefit: When you strike at an object held or carried by an opponent (such as a weapon or shield) you do not provoke an attack of opportunity. You also gain a +4 bonus on any attack roll made to attack an object held or carried by another character.

data.name: Improved Trip
data.description: You do not provoke an attack of opportunity when you attempt to trip an opponent while you are unarmed and gain a +4 bonus on your Strength check to trip your opponent. If you trip an opponent in melee combat you immediately get a melee attack against that opponent.
data.benefit: You do not provoke an attack of opportunity when you attempt to trip an opponent while you are unarmed and gain a +4 bonus on your Strength check to trip your opponent. If you trip an opponent in melee combat you immediately get a melee attack against that opponent.

data.name: Improved Turning
data.description: You turn or rebuke creatures as if you were one level higher than you are in the class that grants you the ability.
data.benefit: You turn or rebuke creatures as if you were one level higher than you are in the class that grants you the ability.

data.name: Improved Two-Weapon Fighting
data.description: In addition to the standard single extra attack you get with an off-hand weapon you get a second attack with it albeit at a -5 penalty.
data.prerequisite: Two-Weapon Fighting, Dex 17, Base attack bonus +6
data.benefit: In addition to the standard single extra attack you get with an off-hand weapon you get a second attack with it albeit at a -5 penalty.

data.name: Improved Unarmed Strike
data.description: You are considered to be armed even when unarmed. However you still get an attack of opportunity against any opponent who makes an unarmed attack on you. In addition your unarmed strikes can deal lethal or nonlethal damage at your option.
data.benefit: You are considered to be armed even when unarmed. However you still get an attack of opportunity against any opponent who makes an unarmed attack on you. In addition your unarmed strikes can deal lethal or nonlethal damage at your option.

data.name: Investigator
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Gather Information checks and Search checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Gather Information checks and Search checks.

data.name: Iron Will
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Will saving throws.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Will saving throws.

data.name: Lightning Reflexes
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Reflex saving throws.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Reflex saving throws.

data.name: Magical Aptitude
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Spellcraft checks and Use Magic Device checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Spellcraft checks and Use Magic Device checks.

data.name: Manyshot
data.description: As a standard action you may fire many arrows at a single opponent within 30 feet.
data.prerequisite: Point Blank Shot, Dex 17, Base attack bonus +6
data.benefit: As a standard action you may fire many arrows at a single opponent within 30 feet.

data.name: Martial Weapon Proficiency
data.description: Choose a type of martial weapon. You understand how to use that type of martial weapon in combat.
data.benefit: Choose a type of martial weapon. You understand how to use that type of martial weapon in combat.

data.name: Maximize Spell
data.description: All variable numeric effects of a spell modified by this feat are maximized. Saving throws and opposed rolls are not affected nor are spells without random variables. A maximized spell uses up a spell slot three levels higher than the spell's actual level. An empowered maximized spell gains the separate benefits of each feat: the maximum result plus one-half the normally rolled result.
data.benefit: All variable numeric effects of a spell modified by this feat are maximized. Saving throws and opposed rolls are not affected nor are spells without random variables. A maximized spell uses up a spell slot three levels higher than the spell's actual level. An empowered maximized spell gains the separate benefits of each feat: the maximum result plus one-half the normally rolled result.

data.name: Mobility
data.description: You get a +4 dodge bonus to Armor Class against attacks of opportunity caused when you move out of or within a threatened area.
data.benefit: You get a +4 dodge bonus to Armor Class against attacks of opportunity caused when you move out of or within a threatened area.

data.name: Mounted Archery
data.description: The penalty you take when using a ranged weapon while mounted is halved: -2 instead of -4 if your mount is taking a double move and -4 instead of -8 if your mount is running.
data.benefit: The penalty you take when using a ranged weapon while mounted is halved: -2 instead of -4 if your mount is taking a double move and -4 instead of -8 if your mount is running.

data.name: Mounted Combat
data.description: Once per round when your mount is hit in combat you may attempt a Ride check (as a reaction) to negate the hit. The hit is negated if your Ride check result is greater than the opponent's attack roll.
data.benefit: Once per round when your mount is hit in combat you may attempt a Ride check (as a reaction) to negate the hit. The hit is negated if your Ride check result is greater than the opponent's attack roll.

data.name: Natural Spell
data.description: You can complete the verbal and somatic components of spells while in a wild shape. You can also use any material components or focuses you possess even if such items are melded within your current form.
data.benefit: You can complete the verbal and somatic components of spells while in a wild shape. You can also use any material components or focuses you possess even if such items are melded within your current form.

data.name: Negotiator
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Diplomacy checks and Sense Motive checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Diplomacy checks and Sense Motive checks.

data.name: Nimble Fingers
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Disable Device checks and Open Lock checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Disable Device checks and Open Lock checks.

data.name: Persuasive
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Bluff checks and Intimidate checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Bluff checks and Intimidate checks.

data.name: Point Blank Shot
data.description: You get a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls with ranged weapons at ranges of up to 30 feet.
data.benefit: You get a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls with ranged weapons at ranges of up to 30 feet.

data.name: Power Attack
data.description: On your action, before making attack rolls for a round, you may choose to subtract up to %1 from all melee attack rolls and add the same number to all melee damage rolls.|PowerAttackMax
data.benefit: On your action, before making attack rolls for a round, you may choose to subtract up to %1 from all melee attack rolls and add the same number to all melee damage rolls.|PowerAttackMax

data.name: Precise Shot
data.description: You can shoot or throw ranged weapons at an opponent engaged in melee without taking the standard -4 penalty on your attack roll.
data.benefit: You can shoot or throw ranged weapons at an opponent engaged in melee without taking the standard -4 penalty on your attack roll.

data.name: Quick Draw
data.description: You can draw a weapon as a free action instead of as a move action. You can draw a hidden weapon as a move action. A character who has selected this feat may throw weapons at his full normal rate of attacks (much like a character with a bow).
data.benefit: You can draw a weapon as a free action instead of as a move action. You can draw a hidden weapon as a move action. A character who has selected this feat may throw weapons at his full normal rate of attacks (much like a character with a bow).

data.name: Quicken Spell
data.description: Casting a quickened spell is an swift action. You can perform another action even casting another spell in the same round as you cast a quickened spell. You may cast only one quickened spell per round. A spell whose casting time is more than 1 full round action cannot be quickened. A quickened spell uses up a spell slot four levels higher than the spell's actual level. Casting a quickened spell doesn't provoke an attack of opportunity. Special: This feat can't be applied to any spell cast spontaneously (including sorcerer spells bard spells and cleric or druid spells cast spontaneously) since applying a metamagic feat to a spontaneously cast spell automatically increases the casting time to a full-round action.
data.benefit: Casting a quickened spell is an swift action. You can perform another action even casting another spell in the same round as you cast a quickened spell. You may cast only one quickened spell per round. A spell whose casting time is more than 1 full round action cannot be quickened. A quickened spell uses up a spell slot four levels higher than the spell's actual level. Casting a quickened spell doesn't provoke an attack of opportunity. Special: This feat can't be applied to any spell cast spontaneously (including sorcerer spells bard spells and cleric or druid spells cast spontaneously) since applying a metamagic feat to a spontaneously cast spell automatically increases the casting time to a full-round action.

data.name: Rapid Reload
data.description: The time required for you to reload your chosen type of crossbow is reduced to a free action (for a hand or light crossbow) or a move action (for a heavy crossbow). Reloading a crossbow still provokes an attack of opportunity.
data.benefit: The time required for you to reload your chosen type of crossbow is reduced to a free action (for a hand or light crossbow) or a move action (for a heavy crossbow). Reloading a crossbow still provokes an attack of opportunity.

data.name: Rapid Shot
data.description: You can get one extra attack per round with a ranged weapon. The attack is at your highest base attack bonus but each attack you make in that round takes a -2 penalty. You must use the full attack action to use this feat.
data.benefit: You can get one extra attack per round with a ranged weapon. The attack is at your highest base attack bonus but each attack you make in that round takes a -2 penalty. You must use the full attack action to use this feat.

data.name: Ride-By Attack
data.description: When you are mounted and use the charge action you may move and attack as if with a standard charge and then move again.
data.benefit: When you are mounted and use the charge action you may move and attack as if with a standard charge and then move again.

data.name: Run
data.description: When running you move five times your normal speed or four times your speed (if wearing medium or heavy armor or carrying a medium or heavy load). If you make a jump after a running start you gain a +4 bonus on your Jump check. While running you retain your Dexterity bonus to AC.
data.benefit: When running you move five times your normal speed or four times your speed (if wearing medium or heavy armor or carrying a medium or heavy load). If you make a jump after a running start you gain a +4 bonus on your Jump check. While running you retain your Dexterity bonus to AC.

data.name: Scribe Scroll
data.description: You can create a scroll of any spell that you know.
data.benefit: You can create a scroll of any spell that you know.

data.name: Self-Sufficient
data.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Heal checks and Survival checks.
data.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on all Heal checks and Survival checks.

data.name: Shield Proficiency
data.description: You can use a shield and take only the standard penalties.
data.benefit: You can use a shield and take only the standard penalties.

data.name: Shot on the Run
data.description: When using the attack action with a ranged weapon you can move both before and after the attack provided that your total distance moved is not greater than your speed.
data.prerequisite: Point Blank Shot, Dex 13, Base attack bonus +4
data.benefit: When using the attack action with a ranged weapon you can move both before and after the attack provided that your total distance moved is not greater than your speed.

data.name: Silent Spell
data.description: A silent spell can be cast with no verbal components. Spells without verbal components are not affected. A silent spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spell's actual level. Special: Bard spells cannot be enhanced by this metamagic feat.
data.benefit: A silent spell can be cast with no verbal components. Spells without verbal components are not affected. A silent spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spell's actual level. Special: Bard spells cannot be enhanced by this metamagic feat.

data.name: Simple Weapon Proficiency
data.description: You make attack rolls with simple weapons normally.
data.benefit: You make attack rolls with simple weapons normally.

data.name: Skill Focus
data.description: You get a +3 bonus on all checks involving that skill.
data.benefit: You get a +3 bonus on all checks involving that skill.

data.name: Skill Knowledge
data.description: You gain access to new knowledge and abilities.
data.benefit: Choose any two skills from one of your current classes' skill lists. You now know these skills as class skills.
data.special: Instead of choosing two class skills, you may choose one cross-class skill (whether you already know it or not) and learn it, treating it as a class skill from that point forward.

data.name: Snatch Arrows

data.benefit: The turbulence of your thoughts prevents others from gaining insight into your actions.

data.name: Open Minded
data.description: You are naturally able to reroute your memory mind and skill expertise. You immediately gain an extra 5 skill points. You spend these skill points as normal.
